2026-0350
2026-04-21ICStandards Council of Canada ActReappointment of the Executive Director of the Standards Council of CanadaRe-appointment of Chantal Guay of Arnprior, Ontario, as Executive Director of the Standards Council of Canada, to hold office during pleasure for a term of two years, effective April 16, 2026.N/A
subject: Reappointment of the Executive Director of the Standards Council of Canada
precis: Re-appointment of Chantal Guay of Arnprior, Ontario, as Executive Director of the Standards Council of Canada, to hold office during pleasure for a term of two years, effective April 16, 2026.
